name: Bitwig Studio MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server enabling AI agents to control Bitwig Studio — a professional digital audio workstation (DAW) popular in electronic music production. Enables agents to control playback, manage tracks, adjust parameters, trigger clips, load instruments, and interact with Bitwig's unique modulation and grid system through MCP tool calls.
use_cases: Controlling Bitwig Studio playback and transport from music production agents
Managing tracks, clips, and automation from composition agents
Triggering sounds and patterns from real-time performance agents
Adjusting synthesizer and effect parameters from creative AI agents
not_for: Teams using Ableton Live, Logic Pro, or other DAWs (Bitwig-specific integration)
Audio rendering and bounce operations (real-time control only)
best_when: A musician or producer using Bitwig Studio wants AI assistance with composition, parameter control, or automated creative workflows — particularly for Bitwig's modular/grid-based features.
avoid_when: You use Ableton Live, Logic, or FL Studio — this is Bitwig-specific. Other DAW MCPs exist for those platforms.

auth.notes: No authentication — connects to local Bitwig Studio instance via Bitwig's OSC or scripting API. Bitwig Studio must be running.

pricing.free_tier_limits: MCP server is free; Bitwig Studio requires license (~$399 one-time or upgrade plan)
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source from WeModulate. Bitwig Studio license required (~$399 perpetual or upgrade plans).

performance.rate_limits: Local real-time DAW control — no rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Bitwig must be running and the DAW session open — MCP server unavailable otherwise
Bitwig API capabilities depend on version — check compatibility with your Bitwig version
Real-time DAW control requires careful timing — some operations have latency constraints
WeModulate is a music-tech company — domain-relevant implementation quality
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local DAW control. No external data transmission. Audio sessions and project files are local. DAW control limited to music production operations — minimal security risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local DAW control only. No credentials. No external data. Low security risk domain.
